description: Emails page layout with Sending/Receiving tab bar, page title, API drawer button, and More actions button
ui_details: Page title 'Emails' (h1), horizontal tab bar with 'Sending' and 'Receiving' tabs. Active tab has underline indicator. Right side: API drawer icon button + three-dot More actions button. Sending tab links to /emails, Receiving tab links to /emails/receiving.
behavior: Clicking tabs navigates between Sending and Receiving views. Tabs update URL and active state. More actions dropdown shows 'Go to docs' link.

unit.name: renders Emails page with tab bar
unit.description: Page renders with Sending and Receiving tabs
unit.expected_output: Both tabs visible, Sending tab active by default

e2e.name: navigate between Sending and Receiving tabs
steps: Verify Receiving tab is now active
e2e.expected: Tab navigation works, URL updates, active state changes

edge_cases.name: direct URL to receiving tab
edge_cases.expected: Receiving tab is active, page loads correctly

description: Emails Sending tab filter bar: search, date range picker, status filter, API key filter, export button
ui_details: Filter bar below tabs. Left to right: Search input (Shadow DOM, placeholder 'Search...'), Date range button (default 'Last 15 days'), Status dropdown (default 'All Statuses'), API Key combobox (default 'All API Keys'), Export icon button (right-aligned).
behavior: Search filters emails by recipient or subject. Date range opens popover with presets (Today, Yesterday, Last 3/7/15/30 days) plus calendar for custom range. Status filter dropdown with 12 options (Bounced, Canceled, Clicked, Complained, Delivered, Delivery Delayed, Failed, Opened, Scheduled, Sent, Queued, Suppressed). API Key filter is a combobox for filtering by API key used.
data_model: Filters: { search: string, dateRange: { from: Date, to: Date }, status: EmailStatus | null, apiKeyId: string | null }

unit.name: date range picker renders preset options
unit.description: Date range popover shows 6 preset options
unit.expected_output: Popover with Today, Yesterday, Last 3 days, Last 7 days, Last 15 days, Last 30 days

unit.name: status filter renders all 12 statuses
unit.description: Status dropdown shows all possible email statuses

e2e.name: filter emails by status
steps: Verify table updates to show only delivered emails
e2e.expected: Table filters to show only emails with 'delivered' status

e2e.name: filter emails by date range preset
e2e.expected: Date range updates, table re-filters, button label changes

edge_cases.name: search with no results
edge_cases.expected: Table shows empty state or 'no results' message

description: Emails Sending tab data table with columns: To, Status, Subject, Sent
ui_details: Data table with 4 columns. To: avatar + email link. Status: colored badge button. Subject: plain text. Sent: relative time with tooltip. Each row has a three-dot 'More actions' button on the right. Clicking email link navigates to /emails/:id.
behavior: Rows are clickable via the email address link, navigating to the email detail page. Status badges show delivery status with color coding. Relative timestamps update dynamically. Row 'More actions' dropdown has 'Share email' option.
data_model: Email list item: { id: string, to: string, status: EmailStatus, subject: string, sent_at: Date }. EmailStatus enum: bounced | canceled | clicked | complained | delivered | delivery_delayed | failed | opened | scheduled | sent | queued | suppressed

unit.name: renders email rows with correct columns
unit.description: Each email row displays To, Status, Subject, Sent columns
unit.expected_output: Table rows with all 4 columns populated

unit.name: formats relative time correctly
unit.description: Sent column shows relative time like 'about 20 hours ago'

e2e.name: click email navigates to detail page
steps: Click on the first email's recipient link
e2e.expected: Navigation to email detail page with correct email data

edge_cases.name: empty email list
steps: Filter to a date range with no emails

description: Email detail page — metadata display and event timeline
ui_details: Page header: 'Email' label + recipient email as h1. Metadata section with key-value pairs: From (email), Subject (text), To (email), ID (UUID with copy button). Email Events section: vertical timeline with status badge + timestamp for each event (e.g., sent Mar 28 4:14 PM → delivered Mar 28 4:14 PM).
behavior: Copy button copies email ID to clipboard. Event timeline shows chronological delivery events. Status badges are interactive (clickable). Header has API drawer button and More actions (Share email).
data_model: Email detail: { id: string, from: string, to: string, subject: string, html: string, text: string, events: Array<{ type: EmailStatus, timestamp: Date }> }

unit.name: renders email metadata fields
unit.description: Shows From, Subject, To, and ID fields
unit.expected_output: All 4 metadata fields displayed with correct values

unit.name: renders event timeline in order
unit.description: Events displayed chronologically with status and timestamp
unit.input: Email with sent and delivered events
unit.expected_output: Timeline shows sent first, then delivered, with formatted timestamps

e2e.name: view email detail page from list
steps: Verify From, Subject, To, ID fields are populated
Verify Email Events timeline is visible
e2e.expected: Email detail page shows all metadata and delivery events

edge_cases.name: copy email ID to clipboard
steps: Click copy button next to email ID
edge_cases.expected: ID copied to clipboard, toast or button state change confirms copy

description: Email detail page — content tabs: Preview, Plain Text, HTML, Insights
ui_details: 4 horizontal tabs below event timeline. Preview (default): rendered email in iframe. Plain Text: plain text content. HTML: raw HTML source. Insights: deliverability report. Copy button next to tabs copies content of active tab.
behavior: Tabs switch content display. Preview shows rendered email. Insights tab shows two sections: 'Needs attention' (issues) and 'Doing great' (passing checks). Each insight is an expandable accordion item. 11 total insight checks covering DMARC, click/open tracking, subdomain usage, link URLs, plain text, body size, no-reply, image hosting, SVG images, YouTube URLs. Report timestamp shown at bottom.
data_model: Insights: Array<{ name: string, status: 'needs_attention' | 'doing_great', details: string }>

unit.name: renders 4 content tabs
unit.description: Preview, Plain Text, HTML, Insights tabs visible
unit.input: Email detail with html and text content
unit.expected_output: 4 tabs rendered, Preview active by default

unit.name: insights categorized correctly
unit.description: Insights split into needs_attention and doing_great groups

e2e.name: switch between content tabs
steps: Navigate to an email detail page
Verify HTML source code is displayed
e2e.expected: Tab switching works, content updates for each tab

edge_cases.name: expand insight accordion item
steps: Click on 'Include valid DMARC record' in Insights tab
edge_cases.expected: Accordion expands to show detailed explanation

description: API code drawer — slide-in panel with multi-language code examples
ui_details: Right-side slide-in drawer triggered by API drawer icon button. Title matches page context (e.g., 'Sending Email API'). Language tabs: Node.js (default), Ruby, PHP, Python, Go, Rust, Java, .NET, cURL. Multiple code sections (Send Email, Send Batch Emails, Retrieve Email, Update Email). Each section has syntax-highlighted code block with copy button. Close button (X) at top.
behavior: Clicking API drawer button opens panel from right. Language tabs switch all code blocks. Copy button copies code to clipboard. Close button or clicking outside closes drawer. For clone: only show Node.js and cURL tabs (per spec: TypeScript/Node.js only).
data_model: API examples: Array<{ title: string, code: Record<Language, string> }>

unit.name: renders API drawer with code sections
unit.description: Drawer shows correct API endpoints with code examples
unit.expected_output: Drawer with Send Email, Send Batch Emails, Retrieve Email, Update Email sections

e2e.name: open and close API drawer
steps: Verify drawer slides in from right
e2e.expected: Drawer opens and closes smoothly with correct content

edge_cases.name: copy code to clipboard
steps: Click copy button on first code block
edge_cases.expected: Code copied to clipboard, button shows success state

description: Emails Receiving tab — list view with empty state
ui_details: Same tab bar as Sending, Receiving tab active. Filter bar: Search input + Date range picker + Export button (fewer filters than Sending). Empty state: centered message 'No received emails yet' with description about predefined address (<anything>@{subdomain}.resend.app) and link to set up custom domain.
behavior: When no received emails exist, empty state is shown with instructions. Each workspace gets a unique subdomain for inbound email. Links to /domains for custom domain setup and to docs.
data_model: Received email: { id: string, from: string, to: string, subject: string, received_at: Date }

unit.name: renders empty state when no received emails
unit.description: Shows empty state message with instructions
unit.expected_output: Empty state with 'No received emails yet' and setup instructions

e2e.name: view receiving tab empty state
steps: Verify empty state message is displayed
Verify link to domains page exists
e2e.expected: Empty state shows with correct message and links
